title: Show HN: I spent 6 years building a ridiculous wooden pixel display
text:
I built the world's most impractical 1000-pixel display and anyone in the world can draw on it. It draws a single pixel at a time and takes 30-60 minutes to complete a single image. Anyone can participate in the project by voting for the next image to be drawn, and submitting images.

https://kilopx.com/

title: Ask HN: What trick of the trade took you too long to learn?
text:
Every week for the last 3 months I’ve learned a new trick when it comes to getting whatever LLM I’m using at the time to produce better output. That’s my trade, but lots of HNers have more interesting trades than that.

In my case, only recently I learned the value of getting an LLM to write and refine a plan.md architecture doc first, and for it to break that doc down into testable phases, and then to implement phase by phase.

Seems obvious in hindsight. But it took too long to learn that that should be my approach. I had been going phase by phase myself- no overarching plan.md for the LLM.

What Trick of the Trade took you too long to learn?
summary: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=44789068

title: Apple's history is hiding in a Mac font
summary:
苹果的历史隐藏在Mac系统的一个名为“**Apple Symbols**”的字体中。该字体于2003年随Mac OS X 10.3 Panther发布，包含通用图标和大量苹果专属符号。虽然现代macOS已主要使用**SF Symbols库**，但此字体仍保留在系统中（如macOS Sequoia 15.1）。

字体中保存了多个苹果历史阶段的“数字遗迹”：
*   **产品与技术**：包含**Apple Newton** PDA（1993-1998）的灯泡标识及系统图标、**PowerPC**处理器标志、经典Macintosh的“帮助”图标、原始**QuickTime**标志（1994年前）、以及**Boot Camp**的菱形图案。
*   **过时硬件与接口**：包括**FireWire**图标、**SCSI**接口、**ADB**连接器（前USB接口）、**苹果Talk**网络协议图标，以及用于**CRT显示器消磁**的符号。
*   **经典设计**：如经典Mac OS的**“等待”指针**（手表图标）和各种**Apple Logo**变体。

从2003年版（1224个字形）到当前版本（4400个字形），该字体持续更新，但核心的历史图标一直被保留下来。这使得它成为了一份数字化的、跨代的技术发展简史，展现了苹果长达数十年的设计遗产。

title: Show HN: Kimu – Open-Source Video Editor
text:
I wanted a proper non-linear video editor built for the web. It always annoyed me how there are practically zero functioning web video editors. And here we are :)

Kimu can: - Work with Video, Audio & Text. - Supports Transitions. - Non-Linear Video Editing with z-axis overlays. - Split/trim - Export - A cute AI agent (coming soon!)

I'm in uni and I started this project out of sheer annoyance that there are zero good web video editors. It is open-source here (https://github.com/robinroy03/videoeditor).

What do y'all think?
summary: https://www.trykimu.com/
